overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a snowy mountain landscape. The character descends from a snow-covered trail through rocky terrain to reach a misty alpine lake, then wades through the shallow water along the shoreline. The clip features high-fidelity game engine graphics with dynamic snow, fog, and water rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain trail with dense vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the snowy mountain path surrounded by snow-laden bushes and trees

entered.detail: snow-covered trail winding through the mountain terrain
bushes heavily laden with snow flanking the path
tall evergreen trees covered in snow on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy, snow-covered mountain trail. Aloy walks forward along the narrow path, surrounded by snow-laden vegetation and trees. The atmosphere is quiet and wintry, with light snowfall visible in the diffused daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain descent approaching alpine lake

events.description: terrain transitions from snow-covered path to exposed rocky ground as the alpine lake comes into view ahead
character steps from rocky shore into the shallow water of the alpine lake

agents.ego_description: carefully descending the rocky slope toward the water's edge, transitioning from snow to stone

entered.detail: exposed rocky ground with patches of snow and gravel
misty alpine lake visible in the distance between the trees
weathered dead tree stump on the rocky hillside

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as Aloy descends from the snowy trail onto rocky terrain. The alpine lake becomes visible through the mist ahead. The character continues down the slope, passing dead tree stumps, and steps into the shallow water at the lake's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow alpine lake shoreline with clear water

events.description: character slows pace and turns head to survey the lake surroundings while wading

agents.ego_description: wading through crystal-clear shallow water along the rocky lakeshore, observing the submerged terrain and distant forest

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible rocky bottom and submerged vegetation
rocky shoreline bordering the clear alpine water
fallen dead trees and branches partially submerged in the lake

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks through the shallow, clear water of the alpine lake along the rocky shoreline. The camera reveals submerged rocks and fallen trees in the water, with a distant forest visible through the mist. The character pauses briefly to look around, taking in the serene mountain lake environment before continuing along the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, snowy mountain trail down to the serene shores of a misty alpine lake. It begins with Aloy walking forward along a narrow path surrounded by snow-laden vegetation and trees under a quiet, wintry sky. As she descends from the trail, the environment opens up into rocky terrain where the lake first becomes visible through the drifting mist. The scene then shifts as she passes dead tree stumps and steps from the slope into the shallow, clear water at the lake's edge. Finally, the camera follows her along the rocky shoreline, revealing submerged logs and a distant forest shrouded in fog as she pauses to take in the alpine landscape.
